# eveng_folder (Resource)

Manages a folder in EVE-NG. Folders are used to organize labs in a hierarchical directory structure.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    eveng = {
      source = "i-am-smolli/eveng"
    }
  }
}

provider "eveng" {}

resource "eveng_folder" "example" {
  path = "/example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) The absolute path of the folder, e.g. '/myfolder' or '/parent/child'.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import eveng_folder.example /example
```
